2606.30196.title: Forewarned is Forearmed: When Non-Sequential Embedding Turns Into an Anomaly Detector
2606.30196.paper_summary: This paper offers an in-depth analysis of non-sequential multimodal sentence-level embeddings, with a particular focus on the SONAR model. We demonstrate that certain embedding dimensions are sensitive to perturbations and can serve as indicators of decoding anomalies. By leveraging the consistency between successive encoding and decoding, we successfully build an accurate detector. Additionally, we explore modifying specific dimensions of interest to attempt to correct them. This work underscores the importance of understanding and analyzing the embeddings themselves to enhance the reliability of multimodal representations.
2606.30196.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文對非序列多模態句子級嵌入進行了深入分析，特別關注SONAR模型。我們證明了某些嵌入維度對擾動敏感，並可以作為解碼異常的指標。通過利用連續編碼和解碼之間的一致性，我們成功建立了一個準確的檢測器。此外，我們探索了修改特定感興趣的維度以嘗試修正它們。這項工作強調了理解和分析嵌入本身的重要性，以提高多模態表示的可靠性。
2606.30196.author: Elys Allesiardo et.al.
2606.30196.authors: Elys Allesiardo, Antoine Caubrière, Valentin Vielzeuf
